defense_profile.notes: Consistent Level 5 reaction formation on emotional stimuli (fear->courage, death->life). No defense activation on neutral or power-related words.

referential_activity.notes: Limited coverage due to single-word response format. High WRAD suggests concrete associations.

epistemic_profile.notes: No epistemic markers detected in single-word responses

mentalization.notes: WAT phase does not measure reflective functioning

complexes.activation_signature: DMRS Level 5 reaction formation fired on both emotional stimuli; immediate reversal to opposites
complexes.notes: Systematic pattern of transforming negative emotions into positive opposites

baseline.notes: Perfect single-word consistency (14/14 responses). Neutral words elicit concrete associations (synonyms, antonyms, coordinates, part-whole). No elaboration or affect on neutral stimuli.
